Chicago · Est. 2025

Our
Story.How it began.

A love of honest baking. A city that deserved something real. One tin that changed everything.

"We make exactly what we can do perfectly — nothing more."

The CozyTin Team · Chicago
The Beginning

Made in Chicago.
With intent.

CozyTin started with a single frustration: why was it so hard to get a genuinely great cookie in this city? Not the chain kind. Not the pre-packaged kind. The kind that's still warm, with a molten center that makes you stop mid-conversation.

We made our first tin for friends on a Sunday. It sold out in forty minutes. The next one sold out faster. We took that as our signal — so we kept baking, exactly as we always had, and built the weekly drop around it.

Chicago was hungry for this. And we intend to keep feeding it — one small, perfect batch at a time.

What We Stand For

Three things.
Non-negotiable.

🧈
Real Ingredients

Real butter. Farm-fresh eggs. Pure vanilla. We buy from people we trust and use ingredients we'd eat ourselves.

⏱️
Baked to Order

Your tin goes in the oven because you ordered it — not before. No pre-baking, no prep-ahead. Every batch is purpose-built.

🏙️
Chicago First

Free delivery, same-day, across the whole city. Our neighbors are our customers. We don't cut corners on either.

Inside the Kitchen

How every tin
gets made.

1
Sunday morning — we start from scratch

No resting dough overnight. Every batch begins drop day. The only thing that was made yesterday is our reputation.

2
Nine cookies, placed by hand

Each cookie goes into the tin individually. Parchment-lined, packed tight. No machines, no assembly line — just hands and intention.

3
Out the door within the hour

Tins leave warm. Drivers cover the whole city same-day, free. You get it while it still smells like a bakery.

4
Sold out. Done. See you Sunday.

We don't extend the drop. We don't take late orders. When it's gone, it's gone — and we'll do it all again next week.

Ready?

Get your tin
before Sunday.

Nine thick, hand-baked cookies pressed into one signature tin — nearly two pounds of golden crust, soft chew, and chocolate chips through every layer. The edges crisp. The center stays gooey. Every bite is different.

What goes in
🧈 Real Butter 🥚 Farm Eggs 🍫 Choc Chips 🌿 Pure Vanilla 🌾 Unbleached Flour 🧂 Sea Salt ✓ No Preservatives
🚀 Free same-day delivery across all of Chicago
📅 Order by 10am Sunday · Delivered by 5pm
🔥 Arrives warm — open and eat immediately
📦 Branded 6.6" tin — collectible & reusable
Arrives warm — open and eat. For later: microwave individual cookies 15–20 seconds, or warm the tin (no lid) at 300°F for 5 minutes. Best enjoyed same day.
Why it hits different

Made the right way,
every single time.

🧈
Real Butter Only

No substitutes, no shortcuts. Unsalted real butter in every batch — you taste the difference from the first bite.

🍪
Baked That Morning

Not pre-made, not reheated. Every tin is baked fresh the morning it leaves our kitchen — arriving warm at your door.

📦
The Tin You Keep

Our 6.6-inch branded tin isn't packaging — it's a collectible. Parchment-lined, reusable, and made to last.

🏙️
Chicago, Always

We don't ship nationwide because warmth can't survive a FedEx box. Our city gets it fresh, or it doesn't go out.

One recipe. Perfected every Sunday.
That's the whole point.
— CozyTin, Chicago · Est. 2025
